Studio FIT India

Online Live Fitness Classes

Train with Expert Coaches live from home

India's Leading Online Fitness Studio

Studio FIT India is India's premier online fitness studio offering live fitness classes you can join from the comfort of your home. Our certified coaches lead interactive sessions in Strength Training, Yoga and Mindfulness, HIIT and Functional Training, Weight Loss Programs, Personal Training, Zumba, Dance Fitness, Aerobics, and Pilates.

Our Fitness Programs

Whether you want to build lean muscle with our Strength Training program, find inner peace through Yoga and Mindfulness, burn maximum calories with HIIT workouts, or achieve sustainable weight loss with our dedicated Weight Loss Programs — Studio FIT India has the perfect fitness solution for you. Our Personal Training offers one-on-one coaching for faster, focused results.

Affordable Plans and Pricing

Choose from flexible membership plans designed for every budget. Our Starter plan starts at just ₹1,699 per month for 26 live classes. The Standard plan offers 3 months of access with 85 live classes. The PRO plan gives you 6 months of unlimited live classes with recorded access. Our Elite yearly plan includes unlimited classes, a full recorded library, and diet consultations. The Transformation Elite 90-day program provides customized diet plans and weekly progress monitoring.

Why Choose Studio FIT India

With experienced certified coaches, flexible morning and evening batches, a supportive community, and affordable pricing, Studio FIT India makes fitness accessible to everyone across India. Join thousands of members who have already transformed their lives. Book a free trial class today and start your fitness journey with India's top online fitness platform.

Contact Us

Reach us on WhatsApp at +91-9310666287, email us at studiofitindiahelpdesk@gmail.com, or follow us on Instagram @studiofitindia1 for daily fitness tips and updates. Located at 6th Floor, I-thum's Galleria Mall, Greater Noida, Uttar Pradesh 201310.

Fat to Fit Challenge Round 5 — 21-Day Transformation Program by Studio FIT India

Studio FIT India presents the Fat to Fit Challenge Round 5, a comprehensive 21-day fitness transformation program running from May 1 to May 21, 2026. This challenge is designed to help participants achieve measurable weight loss and lifestyle improvement through structured training, accountability, and professional coaching. Registration is open at a special rate of just Rs 299.

What Is the Fat to Fit Challenge?

The Fat to Fit Challenge is a 21-day weight loss and body transformation program organized by Studio FIT India. Participants receive a complimentary 21-day diet plan made with simple homemade ingredients, real-time progress tracking via WhatsApp, daily motivation and accountability from certified fitness coaches, weekly training tasks and assessments, and continued access to regular live fitness classes. The challenge is open to all fitness levels, from complete beginners to experienced fitness enthusiasts.

Winner Prizes and Rewards

The top three participants with the best overall transformation will receive exciting rewards. First place wins 6 months of complimentary membership at Studio FIT India. Second place receives 3 months of complimentary membership. Third place earns 1 month of complimentary membership. Winners are evaluated based on overall transformation metrics, consistency throughout the program, and active engagement during the 21-day period.

How to Register for Fat to Fit Challenge Round 5

Registration for the Fat to Fit Challenge Round 5 is available on a first-come, first-served basis. The registration fee is Rs 299 only. To register, contact Studio FIT India via WhatsApp at +91-9310666287 or call directly. Eligibility requires an active Studio FIT India membership valid through May 21, 2026. Limited seats are available, so early registration is recommended.

Frequently Asked Questions

Anyone can participate in this challenge regardless of fitness level. No prior gym experience is required as coaches provide tailored exercise modifications. If you miss a day, the team will help you get back on track. The diet plan is shared via WhatsApp upon registration and uses accessible, healthy ingredients. Your existing membership remains fully active alongside the challenge.

About Studio FIT India

Studio FIT India is India's leading online live fitness studio offering classes in Yoga, HIIT, Strength Training, Zumba, Pilates, and personal training. With certified coaches and flexible morning and evening batches, Studio FIT India makes fitness accessible to everyone across India.
